Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Burning Cloak]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 12''' — Burning Cloak is a technique name.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon uses the Burning Cloak technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — The Burning Cloak technique provides explosive speed and bursts of strength.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon flares the Burning Cloak to leap.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 15''' — The Burning Cloak is an Enforcer technique used by Blackflame disciples.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Burning Cloak is a technique used by Lindon and Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — The Burning Cloak produces black-and-red light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Burning Cloak is a technique Lindon tried to form.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon ignited the Burning Cloak.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon no longer has the speed of the Burning Cloak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 14''' — Burning Cloak is a technique that creates a black-and-red haze.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon moves in bursts of speed while under the Burning Cloak.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — The Burning Cloak is a technique or effect that springs to life around Lindon when he taps his Blackflame core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon's Burning Cloak surged during the fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 5''' — The Burning Cloak is something Lindon needs to recover.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Burning Cloak is a technique fueled by Blackflame madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon relies on the Burning Cloak to close gaps with opponents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon applies the principles of the Burning Cloak to his pure core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — The Burning Cloak's aura and water can dampen its effects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon uses a Burning Cloak-empowered pull to heave Harmony from his feet.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 2''' — The Burning Cloak covers the user in transparent black-and-red flames.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — The Burning Cloak sprung up in the air around Lindon.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — The Burning Cloak is a flame of black and red surrounding the body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon used the Burning Cloak to get close to his opponent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon cycles for the Burning Cloak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Naian uses a Burning Cloak that is thicker and wilder than Lindon's.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — The Burning Cloak outlines a person in black and red.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — The Burning Cloak powers Lindon's movements.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — A focused Burning Cloak surrounds Lindon's Forged Blackflame claws.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — The Burning Cloak can ignite.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — The Burning Cloak provides explosive strength.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — The Burning Cloak blasts Lindon onward when he uses the Path of Black Flame.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Orthos can use the Burning Cloak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Burning Cloak is a state Lindon enters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — The Burning Cloak appeared around Lindon after the echo faded.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon dashed forward with the Burning Cloak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Blue runs with the speed of the Burning Cloak.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon called the Burning Cloak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 13''' — The Burning Cloak is a haze of red and black light that burns around the dragon.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon used the Burning Cloak to intercept an attack before Orthos was hit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — The Burning Cloak is a technique that manifests as a rough, violent black-and-red flame.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon has the explosive speed of the Burning Cloak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — The Burning Cloak is a technique Pride uses to force Orthos's response.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — The Burning Cloak is a technique used by Orthos.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
